reviews.review_description: I love the story line mixed with the beautiful puzzles. This game left me waiting to play every night before going to bed. I could hardly wait to solve each puzzle which opened to new levels. I so hated when the game ended and hope to find more puzzles like this one. Great job!
An escape room with a fabulous environment and narrative!
I enjoy this game. The best I have tried. I am having trouble is releasing said tools however and can't proceed any further in the game. Any suggestions?

developer_response.body:
I don't know exactly where you can't go any further. Is the puzzle blocked or a game error? If the puzzle is blocked, please refer to the YouTube video.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y5kKSjba9GA&list=PLK4mLQvBt8BlLdt0oAvNuAfNZLMUMlvrF

reviews.review_description: What a nice game! Perfect! The games once crashed at the starroom, but afterwards never again. I so hope there will be a follw-up. It is a game that addicts you, you really get hooked. For me a number one game.

This was a game that I somehow instinctively knew was going to be pretty good, but man oh man, I had no idea how good. It’s not just that Relic Seeker: Hypogeum is brilliant; it had me questioning and analyzing the very fabric of its brilliance. Here is a puzzle game that lays down the gauntlet and challenges all other would-be puzzle games. Here is an exploration game of an ancient ruins that emphatically dares anyone to top its visual prowess. Here is a game that does so much with so little plot or action, that it inadvertently mocks most other games that try way too hard. I cannot overstate how much time, thought, attention to detail, skill, craftsmanship, and passion went into this project. The puzzles are incredibly imaginative without being frustratingly difficult; there is an excellent achievement of balance here which is invigorating. The graphics are a jaw-dropping feast for the eyes. You will spend just as much time soaking in the incredible visual splendor and admiring all of the details as you will decoding the puzzles. There is one scene in particular involving constellations that was truly moving, invoking the very real magic of VR. As for the story, the game is broken up into three chapters, and as you advance you find relics that unlock further developments in the ruins’ history. This history involves an ancient alien race and its less-than-benevolent relationship with humans. You may be disappointed to know that there are no actual aliens, or any antagonist for that matter, present in the game. That is not a spoiler; there is no need for any living creature. The game drips with atmosphere; you sense the presence of their ghosts and that is more than enough. Other reviewers have also noted the abrupt ending. I rather liked it. It’s a neat twist to the story, one that makes for a thought-provoking denouement. I think the disappointment for most people lies in the fact that they just didn’t want the game to end, regardless of how. I totally get that, but I still thought it was effective. In case I haven’t effused enough praise, I most definitely recommend the game at the full price. The degree of artistry is marvelous and very appreciated.

Fist, the graphics are beautiful, even more than eclipse, its crisp and the textures are of good quality.
The story keeps you interested and the ending makes you wanting the next chapter. The puzzles are not very difficult but not easy as well, you need observation.
This is definitely a good game, well worth it and I am already waiting to buy the sequel, either on Gear VR or on Quest.

You could make a little bit more puzzles and select them randomly at the start of a new game, that way puzzles are different every time  you start a new game.

This app never got passed the start screen, having issues with a non moving cursor. This must have been already evident because the screen reads instruction if you are having trouble with the cursor. I want my refund. If you straighten out the issue I  Might reinstall

developer_response.body:
(UPDATE2) We fixed the problem. Please enjoy our game.
(UPDATE) Please set gearVR controller to right hand. - I'm sorry for your inconvenience.

reviews.review_description: Truly a great game. Storyline not so gripping, but still enjoyable. Puzzles easy enough to not ruin gameplay. Was hoping for more, but reading another review, developer website no longer available.

Another solid Korean game (where the Oculus Go would be without the Koreans?) with a terrible title that probably cost them some well deserved positive attention.
Just a couple of technical details for the undecided... So movement here is based on teleportation only, which is, however, well implemented. Puzzles are all press/turn/slide type, not very hard. And the rest you can see in the trailer. The game's not long, but solving the puzzles takes some time, so I'd say the length is ok for the price.
However, it seems the end game promise - a sequel - will not materialise. The developer's website seems dead. Unfortunately, I don't blame them - this may be too small of a playground even for tiny players like this development company :(

The first time i played Relic Seeker it crashed about halfway through, i had to reinstall the game and of course in so doing lost all of my progress.
I decided to start again and second time around it was fine, i enjoyed it from start to finish. Nice graphics, immersive and spacious. The puzzle solving was also quite satisfying, each one leading you gradually through the various parts of the temple. The unfolding story was also interesting and the end hints at a sequel but i'm not sure if that's going to happen.
Overall a great adventure that might be up there amongst my favourite virtual reality experiences.

This was one of my first puzzle games and I was blown away. I have since played more puzzle games and I can truly appreciate how special this game is. Some of the puzzles can be a little repetitive, but overall there is a enough variety to make you feel like a puzzle master. The graphics are very well done and the movement of the puzzles is clever and beautifully rendered. Accessing and using items in the inventory can be tricky at times. The game is very well done and a steal at this price point.
Very interesting puzzle and game process. Great graphic design of environment. Really satisfied game.

Perfect 'myst like game' with good mysteries/puzzles to solve. thanks to the dev team !! Could you please make possible to allow  more than one player to launch the game ?? my girlfriend want to play too but she delete my progression each time... It would be so great !!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for enjoying our game. :)
Your review is a high strength for us.
There are no other games that we've developed. Instead, we're working hard on the sequel. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: I love this game. Uncovering secrets and solving puzzles. I can really appreciate how much thought the developers have put in to the whole story. I did get stuck a few times but I have to come back to try and complete the puzzle. I completed it but I reset it to see if I can go start to finish without any outside help.

reviews.review_title: The Game I've bee. Searching for!!
reviews.review_description: FINALLY a game that is not Horror or repeat of the same puzzle over and over.  Theres a narrative story to tie the puzzles together, and every puzzle so far has been unique.  More games like this, please!! I was almost ready to give up on VR games, glad I found this.

Finally a real puzzle game, like the popular Rooms serie on PC. Not some overrated, repetitive and boring stuff like more popular apps.
Graphic is stunning, and the game has a nice balance, being not too easy but not even too hard. Great work! :)

If you like puzzle games, do not hesitate a second more.  It is beyond worth it.  I think i played it till my headset died for 4 consecutive days.  Graphics and visuals are stunning and the story line is great.  I am dying for the follow up.
I loved this game. It's by far my favorite in the game store. I would love more games like to play on my Oculus Go.

Not bad, not bad. Presentation above average, puzzles well done But sometimes the puzzles can be a little obscure as to wot to do next. This could b remidied by quik tips over your hud if u have bin at a puzzle for more than 10minutes. Occulus go implementation and go controller excellent. Well done devs.
This is an incredible game... immersive and fun with an intriguing story. I can't believe you get a game this good for this price!
